auth.label: API Key
auth.description: ScrapingBee API key passed with the api_key query parameter.

actions.name: extract_data
actions.description: Extract structured JSON data from one public URL with ScrapingBee extract_rules.

url.description: The public URL to extract data from with ScrapingBee.

additionalProperties.description: A JSON-compatible value used in ScrapingBee extraction rules or responses.

extractRules.description: The extraction rules object serialized into the extract_rules query parameter.

renderJs.description: Whether ScrapingBee should render JavaScript before returning the page.

waitMs.description: How many milliseconds ScrapingBee should wait before returning the page.

waitFor.description: The CSS selector ScrapingBee should wait for before returning the page.

device.description: The device preset used for the request.

blockAds.description: Whether ScrapingBee should block ads on the page.

blockResources.description: Whether ScrapingBee should block images and CSS resources.

countryCode.description: The two-letter country code used for request geolocation.

premiumProxy.description: Whether ScrapingBee should use premium proxy routing.

stealthProxy.description: Whether ScrapingBee should use stealth proxy routing.

transparentStatusCode.description: Whether ScrapingBee should return the target page status code transparently.

retry.description: How many times ScrapingBee should retry the request on failure.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for extracting structured data with ScrapingBee.

additionalProperties.description: A JSON-compatible value used in ScrapingBee extraction rules or responses.

data.description: The structured data object returned by ScrapingBee extract_rules.

statusCode.description: The HTTP status code returned by ScrapingBee.

resolvedUrl.description: The final resolved URL reported by ScrapingBee.

creditCost.description: The request credit cost reported by ScrapingBee.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for extracting structured data with ScrapingBee.

actions.name: fetch_html
actions.description: Fetch HTML content from one public URL with optional rendering and proxy controls.

url.description: The public URL to fetch with ScrapingBee.

renderJs.description: Whether ScrapingBee should render JavaScript before returning the page.

waitMs.description: How many milliseconds ScrapingBee should wait before returning the page.

waitFor.description: The CSS selector ScrapingBee should wait for before returning the page.

device.description: The device preset used for the request.

blockAds.description: Whether ScrapingBee should block ads on the page.

blockResources.description: Whether ScrapingBee should block images and CSS resources.

countryCode.description: The two-letter country code used for request geolocation.

premiumProxy.description: Whether ScrapingBee should use premium proxy routing.

stealthProxy.description: Whether ScrapingBee should use stealth proxy routing.

transparentStatusCode.description: Whether ScrapingBee should return the target page status code transparently.

retry.description: How many times ScrapingBee should retry the request on failure.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching page HTML with ScrapingBee.

html.description: The HTML content returned by ScrapingBee.

statusCode.description: The HTTP status code returned by ScrapingBee.

contentType.description: The content type returned by ScrapingBee.

initialStatusCode.description: The original target page status code reported by ScrapingBee.

resolvedUrl.description: The final resolved URL reported by ScrapingBee.

creditCost.description: The request credit cost reported by ScrapingBee.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for fetching page HTML with ScrapingBee.

actions.name: get_usage_stats
actions.description: Retrieve the current ScrapingBee API usage and concurrency statistics.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving ScrapingBee usage statistics.

max_api_credit.description: The maximum API credits available in the current billing period.

used_api_credit.description: The API credits already consumed in the current billing period.

max_concurrency.description: The maximum number of concurrent requests allowed.

current_concurrency.description: The current number of concurrent requests in use.

renewal_subscription_date.description: The renewal timestamp for the current subscription period.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for retrieving ScrapingBee usage statistics.
